rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA ISABEL HEWLETT VS. RICHARD FRANCIS OLMEDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2022 line 1. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA HEWLETT Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Complaint is GRANTED in part. Leave to add new defendants is granted. Leave to substitute DOE defendants is granted only if Plaintiff can allege in good faith that doe defendants are being sued in their capacity as property managers independent of their capacity as conservators. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. VERONICA O'CAMPO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2022 line 5. DEFENDANT VERONICA O'CAMPO MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing Required. No later than 9:00 a.m. on May 31, 2022 Defendant to present (1) a declaration from a medical professional attesting to Defendant's sobriety from May 9, 2022 to the date of the declaration and that Defendant's substance abuse is "past" within the meaning of the reasonable accommodation statutes; (2) a proposed opposition to the motion for summary judgment; (3) a proposed opposition to the discovery motion; and (4) responses to request for admissions. Defendant to appear in-person or via Zoom with video capability. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: PIER 39 LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA VS. RANGOON RUBY PIER 39, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2022 line 8. DEFENDANT RANGOON RUBY PIER 39, L.P., DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED 5 days to answer. First Amended complaint is verified by a "vice president" who "pursuant to that title [is] authorized to sign this verification." Any factual dispute as to the veracity of this statement are not appropriate on a demurrer. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
